name: Workout
description: Chat-first embedded-agent training log. Tell the Workout agent what you did — "deadlift 3x5 at 120kg, swam 40 minutes" — and it builds a current session draft, asks for required missing details, then commits on Finish session. Uses the real Möbius embedded chat with model picker, plus a per-exercise drill-down (estimated-1RM/pace trend, records, set-records, full history), strength PRs, cardio bests, weekly volume, category stats, and a streak heatmap.
author: mobius-os
